title: sonchus camporum
intro: Sonchus camporum, also known as the common sowthistle or western sowthistle, is a perennial plant species in the dandelion family, characterized by its edible leaves and bright yellow flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Sonchus camporum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate skin irritations, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often dried and used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
